meta.description: H.O.T-EARTH baseline temperature forecast: per-city ridge regression on standardized physics-informed features. prediction = dot(weights[:-1], (x - feature_mean)/feature_std) + weights[-1]. Climatology: clim(t) = daily[doy-1] + diurnal_month_hour[month-1][utc_hour].
meta.target: temperature_2m (deg C) at t + lead hours
meta.data_source: ERA5 reanalysis via Open-Meteo archive API
meta.wind_convention: u10=-speed*sin(dir), v10=-speed*cos(dir); dir = direction wind comes FROM
